title: abies excelsa var. pendula
intro: Abies excelsa var. pendula, also known as the Himalayan fir, is a variant of the Abies excelsa tree that has pendulous branches. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The essential oils extracted from the plant have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. The Himalayan fir is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oil blends, to promote relaxation, relieve stress, and support immune function.
